observations: no body content beyond YAML frontmatter
standouts: target is a run:// URI referencing a specific dragnet run

concerns: No descriptive text explaining why the run is attached
Target run contents and status are not verifiable from this file alone
Attachment record contains no author or expiration metadata
notes: A thin, timestamped pointer from the design-assets channel to dragnet run 1782138356.
questions: What artifacts or results does the referenced dragnet run contain?

intention_signals: It appears to be trying to preserve a reference to a specific dragnet analysis run so the design-assets channel can recall or contextualize that run's results.
